title: knema andamanica subsp. peninsularis
intro: Knema andamanica subsp. peninsularis, also known as the Andaman knema, is a plant species in the family Myristicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Knema andamanica subsp. peninsularis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to create remedies for various health conditions.
